title: Second follow-through add-on after cap promotion
hypothesis: After the accepted 50% day-2 add-on and 40% initial cap, enabling the prior day-5 second add-on might become material.
decision: Do not promote. The replay improved only mid_weak, regressed late_strong, and missed Gate 4 materiality.
next_retry_requires: Forward/paper evidence that second add-ons have larger effect after the new cap stack.
A new orthogonal confirmation source, such as event context, not another nearby size/cap sweep.
